verdict: A well-synced, energetic Medium chart with great pacing, held back only by a few awkward jump transitions that disrupt the physical flow.

issues.problem: The rapid transition from a DR jump directly into U -> D eighth notes requires an awkward weight shift that can easily trip up players at this difficulty level.
The eighth-note run U -> L leading immediately into a DR jump forces a sudden, uncomfortable full-body shift.
Transitioning from a UR jump directly into L -> D eighth notes is extremely abrupt and causes balance issues.
